reviews.comment:
Mala atención del personal.
Muchas apatía, creerán que simplemente están despachando a la gente que para en el lugar?
Muy comercial: te cobran agua caliente, aire para neumáticos, solo falta que te cobre para ir al baño.
Malo

(Translated by Google)
Poor service from the staff.
Very apathetic. Do they think they're just sending people away?
Very commercial: they charge you for hot water, tire air, and the only thing missing is a charge to use the bathroom.
Bad
